narrative:
Franklin Township has 5,486 registered voters, with 70.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.0 percentage points.
